title: Graphic Design Links
body:
[graphic\_arts](#ag) [associations](#associations) [clip\_art](#clipart) [schools](#schools) [studios](#studios) [logos](#logos) [professionals](#professionals) [publications](#publications) [software](#software) [typography](#typographies)

graphic\_arts\_

> [Solograficas.com](http://www.solograficas.com/) Portal for the graphic arts sector

* * *

associations\_

> [AGD-FAD](http://www.adg-fad.org/) Association of Art Directors and Graphic Designers. [Association of Professional Designers (ADP)](http://www.adp-barcelona.com/) Interdisciplinary association of designers founded in Barcelona in 1978 with the aim of defending their professional interests. [Barcelona Centre de Disseny (BCD)](http://www.bcd.es/) BCD is an organization dedicated to the promotion of design. [BEDA](http://www.beda.org/) The Bureau of European Designers Associations. [CODIG](http://www.codig.com/) College of Graphic Designers.

* * *

clip\_art\_

> [GoGraph](http://es.gograph.com/) A clipart library with over 20,000 images, animated GIFs, backgrounds.... [age Fotostock](http://www.agefotostock.com/) A stock library with thousands of high-quality photos, available for purchase.... [Free Graphics](http://www.recursosgratis.com/tipos_de_letra_y_graficos) A compilation of websites offering all kinds of free graphics.

* * *

schools\_

> [List of design schools around the world](http://www.core77.com/design.edu/intschools.html) [BAU](http://www.baued.es/) School of Design. Graphic Design, Interior Design, and Fashion Design. Center affiliated with the University of Vic. [CEV](http://www.cev.com/) Higher School of Communication, Image, and Sound. [Elisava](http://www.iccic.edu/elisava/) Barcelona School of Design. [Escola Còmic Joso](http://www.sendanet.es/escolajoso/) "Joso Còmic" School of Comics, the only center in Spain specializing in the teaching of comics. [ESDAI](http://www.esdai-informatica.com/) Higher School of Computer Application Development: Advertising Graphic Design and Multimedia Systems. [ESDI](http://www.esdi.es/) Higher School of Design. Barcelona. [IDEP](http://www.idep.es/) School specializing in training professionals in image and design. Barcelona. [European Institute of Design (IED)](http://www.iedbcn.com/) Three-year programs, refresher courses and continuing education, advanced training courses, and master’s and postgraduate programs in the fields of design, fashion, and audiovisual communication. [LAI](http://www.ictnet.es/+lai/) LAI School of Design, a private higher education institution affiliated with the International University of Catalonia (UIC). [LLOTJA](http://www.xtec.es/centres/a8013329/) EAAOA Llotja. School of Fine Arts and Design. Barcelona. [MASSANA](http://www.escolamassana.es/) Escola Massana, Municipal Center for Art and Design. Barcelona. [Reus School of Art and Design](http://www.altanet.org/ciutada/escartdis/eareus.html)

* * *

design studios\_

> [aTIPUS](http://www.atipus.com/) graphic design & web explorers [bertan](http://www.bertan.org/) bertan design & advertising

* * *

logos\_ Websites where you can download the vast majority of logos for free in vector format. Don’t waste your time; it’s silly to repeat what others have already done (and also for others to repeat what we’ve already done).

> [http://www.logotypes.ru/default\_e.asp](http://www.logotypes.ru/default_e.asp) [http://www.visual.gi/logoteca/logos.html](http://www.visual.gi/logoteca/logos.html) [http://www.logonet.net/home.htm](http://www.logonet.net/home.htm) [http://www.lineaire.com/logos/](http://www.lineaire.com/logos/) [http://www.findlogo.com/index.htm](http://www.findlogo.com/index.htm)

* * *

professionals\_

> [AJL disseny](http://www.xarop.com/ajl) Graphic, web, and multimedia design.

* * *

publications\_

> [DISSENY.info](http://www.disseny.info/) The portal’s main objective is to promote design as one of the keys to competitiveness in the industry. And to do so, quite simply, the industry must be able to see what new designers are creating and propose to get in touch with them and plan [CORE77](http://www.core77.com/) Design magazine and resource. [VIGITAL](http://www.mundofree.com/joanmmas/) A collection of simple and practical ideas, tips, and information on the creative use of the computer. [VISUAL](http://www.visual.gi/) Visual is the Magazine of Design, Graphic Creativity, and Visual Communication. [THE CREATIVE’S WEBSITE](http://www.pricewin.net/wdcweb) The Creative’s Website (WdC) aims to promote the work of all companies and professionals whose activities prioritize creativity. [LINKZ multimedia](http://www.linkzmultimedia.com/) By analyzing each project, we’ll discover what makes them unique in graphic and interactive design, as well as in marketing, development, and user satisfaction.

* * *

software\_

> [ADOBE](http://www.adobe.com/) Photoshop, Premiere, Pagemaker, Acrobat, ATM,... [AUTODESK](http://www.autodesk.com/) 3D Studio MAX, AutoCAD, ... [COREL](http://www.corel.com/) Draw, PhotoPaint, ... [QUARK](http://www.quark.com/) QuarkXPress, Passport, Imedia, ... [MACROMEDIA](http://www.macromedia.com/) FreeHand, Director, Flash, Fireworks, Dreamweaver, ... [MICROGRAFX](http://www.micrografx.com/) Picture Publisher, Symply 3D, ...

* * *

fonts\_

> [Free Fonts](http://www.recursosgratis.com/tipos_de_letra_y_graficos/tipos_de_letra) A compilation of websites offering free fonts. [Crysoft. Fonts Section](http://crysoft.com/letras/menufuen.htm%20) Thousands of fonts for your computer, sorted alphabetically. [Tecnopolis Fonts](http://tecnopolis.net/Fuentes/%20) Collection of hundreds of fonts available for download in compressed files. You can view them and decide which ones you’d like to download. [Publi Fuentes](http://publispain.com/superfuentes/%20) Over 1,000 TrueType and PostScript fonts available for download. Organized and accompanied by GIFs so you can see what each one looks like before downloading. [Vigital - Digital Typography](http://teleline.terra.es/personal/joanmmas/tipog/%20) Everything about digital typography. We include free original fonts (especially for illustration). [On snot and fonts](http://cgm.cs.mcgill.ca/%7Eluc/fonts.html) The definitive compendium of links on any topic related to typography.
